stemHtml: According to the ILS coverage area as defined by ICAO Annex 10, the pilot will be guaranteed a reliable signal from the localizer at…

options.a: 10 NM from the threshold on an inbound course and 38° displaced from the localizer centreline.
options.b: 19 NM from the threshold on an inbound course and 13° displaced from the localizer centreline.
options.c: 20 NM from the threshold on an inbound course and 8º displaced from the localizer centreline.
options.d: 27 NM from the threshold on an inbound course and 8° displaced from the localizer centreline.
